audience: Law firm owners and managing partners who want to grow their practice
audienceContext: Attorneys are skeptical of marketing agencies, value transparency, hate long contracts, and make decisions based on ROI evidence

goals.ranking: Rank for each page's target topic in Google and AI search
goals.usability: Clear structure, fast comprehension, obvious next step on every page
goals.audienceDelight: Speak to attorney pain points, demonstrate legal marketing expertise, differentiate from generic agencies

service-evaluator.description: Attorney actively comparing marketing agencies. Wants to see pricing, proof of results, and a clear process. Skeptical of hype, responds to specifics.
keyQuestions: What does this cost and what do I get?
Can you prove this works for firms like mine?
How is this different from the last agency I hired?

local-searcher.description: Attorney searching for marketing help in their specific city. Wants confirmation that the agency serves their market and understands local competition.
keyQuestions: Do you work with firms in my city?
Do you understand my local legal market?
What results have you gotten in my area?

practice-specific.description: Attorney in a specific practice area evaluating whether this agency understands their niche. Skeptical of generalist agencies that claim to serve everyone.
keyQuestions: Do you actually understand my practice area?
What specific strategies work for my type of law?
Have you worked with other firms in my niche?

explorer.description: Attorney early in their search, browsing and forming first impressions. Wants to quickly understand what JurisPage does and whether it is worth further investigation.
keyQuestions: Is this worth my time to explore further?

researcher.description: Attorney looking for actionable information about legal marketing. Wants practical advice, not a sales pitch. May or may not be evaluating agencies.
keyQuestions: What should I know about this topic?
Is this advice trustworthy and specific?
Can I use this information to evaluate my current agency?

proof-seeker.description: Attorney looking for evidence that this agency delivers results. Wants to see specific numbers, client situations similar to theirs, and verifiable outcomes.
keyQuestions: Have you worked with a firm like mine?
What specific results did you deliver?
